qualification_questions: What type of building needs an audit?
When do you need the report?
tenant.faq_context: A preparation checklist can be shared by text. It covers recent utility bills, floor plans when available, and access to the mechanical room.
tenant.ai_context: Respect a refusal to call. Continue helping in the current channel without repeating a meeting offer.

initial_history.body: The team could give you a clearer answer on a short consultation call. Would you like me to arrange one?

turns.inbound: I don't want a call. Please just send me the preparation checklist here.

replay_outputs.reply_text: Absolutely. I can share the preparation checklist here and keep everything by text. It covers recent utility bills, any available floor plans, and access to the mechanical room. If you change your mind, we can book a short call.
replay_outputs.reasoning_summary: The lead refused a call and asked for support in the current channel.

required_facts: The checklist can be provided in the current text conversation.
The checklist covers utility bills, available floor plans, and mechanical-room access.
forbidden_claims: The lead agreed to a meeting.
semantic_criteria: Honor the call refusal without challenging it.
Continue providing useful support by text.
